name: Apple Oat Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix all wet ingredients in a large bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, milk, salt, and yeast.
4. Gradually add the dry mixture to the wet mixture and stir until combined.
5. Fold in the apples, apple juice, lemon juice, honey, yogurt, molasses, and oats.
6. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan and bake for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the bread to cool before serving.
